briefing: Markets were neutral today (NASDAQ +0.6%, S&P 500 +0.3%) with no broad risk-on signal, so we held back from deploying most of our remaining cash. FIG stood out with full multi-signal confirmation (RSI, MACD, price/SMA, volume), so we took one high-conviction position while leaving existing holdings untouched.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Multi-signal confirmation means only taking a high-conviction trade when several independent technical indicators agree — for example, bullish RSI, a MACD crossover, price above its moving average, and a volume surge all pointing the same direction. Relying on just one signal is more likely to produce false positives, while stacking signals suggests broader, more reliable buying interest.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 多重訊號確認是指只有在多個獨立技術指標同時發出一致訊號時才進行高信心交易，例如RSI處於偏多區間、MACD出現黃金交叉、股價高於其移動平均線，以及成交量出現放大等訊號同時出現。只依賴單一訊號較容易出現誤判，而多項訊號疊加則顯示更廣泛、更可靠的買盤力量。

market_education.summary_en: Both major indices posted modest gains today, with the NASDAQ slightly outpacing the S&P 500, reflecting a mild risk-on tone without a clear catalyst. Trading stayed within a narrow range as investors awaited more decisive economic or earnings news. Overall sentiment remained cautiously constructive rather than strongly bullish.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日美股兩大指數均錄得溫和升幅，納斯達克指數升幅略高於標普500指數，反映市場帶有輕微的risk-on氣氛，但缺乏明確催化劑。大市在窄幅區間內波動，投資者仍在等待更具方向性的經濟數據或財報消息。整體市場情緒保持審慎樂觀，尚未形成強烈的上升趨勢。

trades.reasoning: FIG shows all four confirming signals — bullish RSI, MACD crossover, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge — the institutional-participation pattern that has worked well historically.
